name: Liaoning SG Automotive Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Liaoning SG Automotive Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automobiles, axles, and components in China. The company offers city, coach, school, commuter, city feeder, electric, and hybrid buses; SUVs, CUVs, and pickup trucks; and special vehicles, including container transporters, warehouse gate semi-trailers, gate semi-trailers, multipurpose fire engines, and van products. It also provides sedan chassis products, light-duty axles, and heavy-duty axles, as well as components, including slip yokes, pinion flanges, gears, tubes, steering knuckles, various types of shaft, hollow axle shafts, axle shafts for rear drive axles, stub axle shafts for front drive axles, split-type Diff cases, and carrier housings. The company offers its vehicles under the Huanghai brand, and axles and components under the SG brand. Liaoning SG Automotive Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Dandong, China.
